Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions Award
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT YULIA MOROZOVA and ROYTMAN & MOROZOVA, DDS's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is granted. The matters specified in the Requests For Admission served upon Plaintiff on February 22, 2010 are deemed admitted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $330, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
